spring-component-scan/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Context dependency to a version compatible with Java 17.
spring-component-scan/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Framework 4.x does not support Java 17; attempting to run or compile against it on JDK 17 results in runtime errors (e.g., IllegalAccessError due to strong encapsulation of internal JDK APIs) or build failures.
